backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining product, order, cart, and user profile types with CRUD operations, access control integration, and admin-only product management endpoints.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old product schema (text category) to new schema with enum categories and deliveryType field, defaulting to oneHourDelivery.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: INR currency conversion, Food category addition, and delivery type field with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration with details on INR display, Food category, and delivery type implementations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining earth-tone palette and design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Shop Central application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and admin product creation, wrapped with AuthGuard and ProfileSetup.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that shows loading state during initialization and login prompt for unauthenticated users before rendering children.
frontend/src/components/CartBadge.tsx: Badge component displaying total cart item count with conditional rendering when count is zero.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item component showing product image, details, INR price, quantity selector, item total, and remove button with loading states and image fallback.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header component with logo, category links, search bar, cart button, and login button. Includes responsive mobile menu and conditional admin 'Add Product' link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with Header, main content outlet, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that toggles between login and logout states using Internet Identity, with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card showing image, name, category, price, delivery type, stock quantity, and add-to-cart button. Handles image errors with placeholder fallback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name on first login.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: Reusable quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and direct number input, supporting min/max constraints.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with debounced navigation that updates URL search params after 300ms delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for cart operations including get, add, remove, update quantity, checkout, and order history retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Exports React Query hooks for product operations including fetching all products, fetching a single product by ID, and creating new products with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and save the current user's profile, with automatic cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRole.ts: Exports a React Query hook to check if the current caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a warm, earthy color scheme (terracotta, sage green, cream) supporting both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page component with shipping information form validation that processes cart checkout and navigates to order confirmation on success.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProduct.tsx: Admin-only product creation form with validation for name, price, category, stock, delivery type, and image URL, redirecting to the new product page on success.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying success message and latest order details with a button to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Product catalog page with hero banner that displays filterable product grid based on category and search query parameters, with loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page component that displays product information, images, pricing in INR, delivery type (1-hour delivery or takeaway), stock status, and quantity selector with add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ShoppingCart.tsx: Shopping cart page component that displays cart items, order summary with total in INR, and navigation buttons for checkout or continuing shopping.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography with Playfair Display and Inter fonts, custom animations, and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the e-commerce application's features including INR pricing, food category, and delivery type options (1-hour delivery and takeaway).
